name: gsm8k_dynamic_rescreen_best_full
note: Dynamic rescreen / dynamic sampling. Best comparable full GSM8K eval observed: 0.6611, n=1319, stage_2 step=100.

name: gsm8k_hardbuffer_k3_zstd_length
note: Hard buffer family with K3/negative-weight/zstd/length reward variants. Full GSM8K best in summary: 0.6262 n=1319; small eval 0.7500 n=164 exists but is not full eval.

name: gsm8k_state_tuning_mainline
note: Early GRPO/state-tuning mainline. Included because many early high small-eval and baseline experiments point here.

name: gsm8k_real_label_variant
note: Real-label / label-correct variant. Full GSM8K best in summary around 0.6065 n=1319.

name: math500_hardbuffer
note: Math500 hard-buffer code family; also used by several GSM8K hard-buffer result dirs through copied code lineage.

name: rwkv_deepmath_trl_doc_baseline
note: RWKV implementation aligned to TRL GRPO doc / DeepMath-style runs.

name: rwkv_deepmath_fp32_noentropy
note: FP32-kernel/no-entropy variant used after precision and entropy-memory debugging.

name: rwkv_deepmath_fastrollout_traintempv3
note: Fast rollout / train_temp v3 version. Included as the useful speed-optimized branch.

name: rwkv_gsm8k_rlcsd
note: RLCSD reproduction branch for GSM8K. Included as a paper-aligned comparable algorithm branch.

name: qwen_trl_grpo_reference
note: Qwen/TRL reference reproduction scripts; useful control for comparing RWKV against TRL doc settings.
